name: Sons of Anarchy
description: SAMCRO, Charming, and seven seasons of motorcycle-club mayhem.

questions.q: What is the collective name for the founding members of SAMCRO?
What is the real name of the prospect nicknamed 'Half-Sack'?

source.notes: Full name: Kip Epps. Nickname comes from a war injury.

questions.q: What medical device does Piney rely on throughout the series?

source.notes: Piney has emphysema; the tank goes everywhere with him.

questions.q: In SAMCRO slang, what is an 'Old Lady'?
choices: A wife or girlfriend of a club member

questions.q: What is the term for a single woman who hangs around the clubhouse hoping to attach to a member?

source.notes: Named after the SAMCRO Reaper / crow patches.

questions.q: What is the term for a non-member who associates with the club without being patched in?

source.notes: One step before becoming a Prospect.

questions.q: What does 'meeting Mr. Mayhem' mean in SAMCRO?

source.notes: Used as the formal vote when the club orders a member's death.

questions.q: What is the name of the room where SAMCRO holds its votes and meetings?
What is Tig's role in SAMCRO?

source.notes: Replaced as SAA later by Happy.

questions.q: Who is the President of SAMCRO at the start of the series?

source.notes: Clay Morrow, played by Ron Perlman. Jax succeeds him.

questions.q: How are Piney and Opie related?
Who kills Piney in Season 4?

source.notes: Clay shoots Piney to keep him from exposing the cartel deal.

questions.q: What is the name of Opie's first wife?

source.notes: Killed in Season 1 in a botched hit.

questions.q: What is the name of Jax's late younger brother?

source.notes: Tommy Teller. Jax later names his second son after him.

questions.q: What is the name of the baby born to Jax and Wendy in Season 1?
What is the name of Jax's daughter Ellie's father?

source.notes: Ellie is Opie and Donna's daughter, not Jax's.

questions.q: What kind of motorcycles do the SAMCRO members ride?

source.notes: Specifically Harley-Davidson Dyna models, on screen.

questions.q: In what decade is the motorcycle club founded in the show's backstory?

source.notes: Founded in 1967 by John Teller and Piney Winston in Charming, CA.

questions.q: What is Lyla's profession when introduced in the series?

source.notes: Works at Cara Cara, the porn studio SAMCRO has a stake in.

questions.q: What is the name of the prospect nickname acronym 'RUB' for the wealthy weekend riders SAMCRO mocks?

source.notes: RUB = Rich Urban Biker — pejorative for affluent weekend Harley owners.
